# Mos (macOS)

Mos is a free, open-source macOS menu bar utility that makes mouse wheel scrolling smooth while preserving mouse precision. It supports per-app scroll profiles, independent X/Y axis settings, scroll hotkeys, mouse button bindings, and Logitech HID++ button integration.

## Primary resources

- [Homepage](https://mos.caldis.me/)
- [Markdown homepage](https://mos.caldis.me/index.md)
- [Full LLM context](https://mos.caldis.me/llms-full.txt)
- [Developer resources](https://mos.caldis.me/developers/)
- [Agent mode view](https://mos.caldis.me/agent/)
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Caldis/Mos)
- [GitHub wiki](https://github.com/Caldis/Mos/wiki)
- [Releases](https://github.com/Caldis/Mos/releases)
- [Latest release](https://github.com/Caldis/Mos/releases/latest)
- [Appcast](https://mos.caldis.me/appcast.xml)

## Agent and developer discovery

- [Root agent.json](https://mos.caldis.me/agent.json)
- [Well-known agent.json](https://mos.caldis.me/.well-known/agent.json)
- [A2A agent card](https://mos.caldis.me/.well-known/agent-card.json)
- [AI plugin manifest](https://mos.caldis.me/.well-known/ai-plugin.json)
- [MCP discovery status](https://mos.caldis.me/.well-known/mcp)
- [OpenAPI service description](https://mos.caldis.me/api/openapi.json)
- [Schema map](https://mos.caldis.me/schema-map.xml)
- [Software schema feed](https://mos.caldis.me/schema/software.jsonl)

## Section llms.txt files

- [Product docs context](https://mos.caldis.me/docs/llms.txt)
- [Developer context](https://mos.caldis.me/developers/llms.txt)
- [API context](https://mos.caldis.me/api/llms.txt)

## Install

- Homebrew: `brew install --cask mos`
- [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/Caldis/Mos/releases/latest)

## Auth, API, webhooks, and MCP status

- Public documentation and discovery files require no authentication.
- No public OAuth, REST API, webhooks, or hosted MCP tool server are currently provided.
- The OpenAPI file describes the static discovery endpoints that agents can fetch.

## Notes

- Platform: macOS 10.13 or later.
- License: CC BY-NC 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/).
- Mos is not intended to be distributed via the Mac App Store.
